snippet.title: Hurricane - LOCO LOCO - Serbia 🇷🇸  - Official Music Video - Eurovision 2021
snippet.description:
Hurricane will represent Serbia at the Eurovision Song Contest 2021 with the song LOCO LOCO.
-
Composer: Nemanja Antonić
Lyrics: Sanja Vučić
Arrangement: Nemanja Antonić, Darko Dimitrov
-
Lyrics:
Nemoj da se ljutiš, hrabrost skupi
Jedna cura kao ja ne traži obećanja
Ne skidaš taj pogled ti sa mene
Lako ušla sam ja u tvoje vene

Osmeh tvoj mi kaže
Da me želiš koga lažeš
Slatka kao ćoko moko
Hajde budi loco

Ram ba-ba-bam
A ja slatka sam i fina
A ti si sam sam sam
I ja znam znam znam
Da biže lom lom lom
Zato hajde budi loco loco

Baby, baby, baby, čemu drama
Jedna cura kao ja ne traži obećanja
Baby, baby, baby, igram sama
To što nisi sa mnom to je tvoja mana

Osmeh tvoj mi kaže
Da me želiš koga lažeš
Slatka kao čoko moko
Hajde budi loco

1, 2... Girls, Come on!
Loco loco
Loco loco
Loco loco

Ne skidaš pogled sa mene
Lako sam ti ušla u vene
Hajde budi loco loco

A ja slatka sam i fina
A ti si sam sam sam
I ja znam znam znam
Da biće lom lom lom
Zato hajde budi loco loco
A ja slatka sam i fina
A ti si sam sam sam
I ja znam znam znam
Da biće lom lom lom
Zato hajde budi loco loco

-

If you want to know more about the Eurovision Song Contest, visit https://eurovision.tv

Shop the official Eurovision Song Contest merchandise: https://shop.eurovision.tv/
Follow us on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/eurovision 
Follow us on Twitter: https://twitter.com/Eurovision
Follow us on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/EurovisionSongContest/

snippet.title: Evo što Srbi misle o Vučićevoj izjavi da je malvazija odvratno vino
snippet.description: Tijekom gostovanja na sarajevskoj komercijalnoj televiziji Face u intervjuu snimljenom ranije ovaj tjedan Vučić je rekao kako je "vino (malvazija) odvratno i nitko ga ne može piti". U nedjelju ujutro se istarskim vinarima ispričao zbog te izjave, a evo kako tu izjavu komentiraju njegovi sugrađani te što misle o vinu.

snippet.title: CBC News: The National | Meghan and Harry’s Oprah interview; Vaccine optimism | March 7, 2021
snippet.description:
Prince Harry and Meghan sit down with Oprah for a revealing interview about leaving their roles as senior royals. The reasons to be optimistic about the vaccine rollout and the road ahead. Plus, the officer charged with killing George Floyd goes on trial. 

#HarryandMeghan
#COVID19
#GeorgeFloyd

00:00 The National for March 7, 2021
01:06 Harry and Meghan's Oprah interview
06:32 Multiple donors for same WE Charity project
09:28 Vaccines won’t be end of masks, distancing,
11:36 Canada's COVID-19 vaccine rollout 
12:14 Ontario pharmacies vaccine pilot project 
14:19 Easing COVID-19 restrictions 
14:41 Rally for return of youth sports in Quebec 
16:51 Questions about DHL 'hidden fees'
19:16 Violence continue to escalate in Myanmar
19:40 Pope preaches peace during Iraq visit 
22:55 George Floyd murder trial 
27:46 COVID-19 Pandemic: One Year Later 
28:21 What year two of the pandemic might look like
31:19 Helping seniors access COVID-19 vaccines
34:30 Alberta MLA monitored by police
43:30 Shell Alberta to use robotic dogs 
44:03 The Moment: From Prairies to Bollywood

Subscribe to The National: 
https://www.youtube.com/user/CBCTheNational?sub_confirmation=1

Connect with The National online:
Facebook | https://www.facebook.com/thenational
Twitter | https://twitter.com/CBCTheNational
Instagram | https://www.instagram.com/cbcthenational

More from CBC News | https://www.cbc.ca/news

The National is CBC's flagship nightly news program, featuring the day's top stories with in-depth and original journalism, with hosts Adrienne Arsenault and Andrew Chang in Toronto, Ian Hanomansing in Vancouver and the CBC's chief political correspondent, Rosemary Barton in Ottawa.

#FOBIJE

Ide priča da u oku mom đavo stanuje
Noć je gore
Jutra hladna k’o led

Da se svima
Pakao samo raduje
Jer tu ljubav ne stiže na red

A ti znaš, zar ne?!
Nisam kriva ja
Posle tebe bol me je
Loše skrojila

Nema sad šanse da opet volim
Pancir sa ovog srca da sklonim
Jer još uvek me
Lome fobije
Da me isti kalibar ne ubije
Jer još uvek me
Lome fobije
Da me isti kalibar ne ubije

Pored mene
Samo ranjene duše padaju
K’o da sada
Samo radim na zlo
Baš od one,
One što za ljubav bi dala sve
Jedan posto
Nije ostalo

Albina will represent Croatia at the Eurovision Song Contest 2021 with the song Tick-Tock. She won Dora 2021, the Croatian national selection show for the Eurovision Song Contest.

Video by: HRT

-

If you want to know more about the Eurovision Song Contest, visit https://eurovision.tv

snippet.title: Prince Harry, Meghan reveal struggles behind royal rift in Oprah interview
snippet.description:
Prince Harry and Meghan Markle's revealing interview with Oprah Winfrey outlined their motivations for breaking from the Royal Family, including Meghan’s suicidal thoughts. 

Watch The National live on YouTube Sunday-Friday at 9 p.m. ET

snippet.title: RIJEKA vs HAJDUK 0:1 (23.kolo, HT Prva liga 20/21)
snippet.description:
U novom Jadranskom derbiju, susretu 23. kola HT Prve lige, Hajduk je s 1:0 pobijedio Rijeku na Rujevici.

Posljednja ligaška utakmica Hajduka bila je ona prije dva i pol tjedna baš na Rujevici, a i tada su Splićani slavili s minimalnih 1:0 (zaostali susret).

No, ovaj put je Hajduk ostavio mnogo bolji dojam, a u premijeri je Marko Livaja pokazao kako će biti veliko pojačanje Hajduka. Mnogo toga je pokazao i Kačaniklić, također novi igrač na Poljudu, koji je ušao u igru u drugom poluvremenu.

Igralo se otvoreno s obje strane, no Hajduk je kao rijetko kada ove sezone djelovao vrlo organizirano i konkretno. Livaja je bio sjajan u igri prema naprijed, dok je dva gola Umuta Nayira poništio VAR. No, u 73. minuti je Turčin zabio i treći put, na odličnu asistenciju Livaje, što je bio gol odluke.

Rijeka je potom nasrnula na suparnika i u 96. minuti dobila idealnu priliku za izjednačenje. Andrijašević je izveo jedanaesterac, ali je Kalinić obranio i sačuvao Hajduku tri boda.

Hajduk je Rijeci došao na samo tri boda zaostatka, a ima i odigranu utakmicu manje.

HT Prva liga, 23. kolo: Rijeka - Hajduk 0:1 (Umut Nayir 73.)

snippet.title: Meghan Markle Says Kate Middleton Made Her Cry Before Wedding
snippet.description: Meghan Markle is setting the record straight. The former “Suits” star spoke with Oprah Winfrey during a bombshell tell-all on CBS, where she addressed a past rumor that she made Kate Middleton cry prior to her wedding to Prince Harry. She said the situation was actually the opposite, and that it was actually Kate who made her cry and that her sister-in-law ended up apologizing.

Color Correction: Nikola Marinković
Camera: Artcorestudio
Lighting: Sapa Light

Actor: Nikola 

Makeup: Ena Jović
Costume: Dijana Malnar
Hair: Jovana Jeremić



LYRICS:
Svaki sat, svaki sprat ja sam brojala,
Noćima ispred tvojih vrata plakala.
I kad ljubav u tebi ne osećam,
Ne dam ja na tebe - MOJE.

Vidim sve, čujem sve, sve predosećam,
Nisi lep, nisi dobar, nisi čaroban.
Moj si lom, moj si slom, moj si brodolom,
Ja u tebi sve sam našla.

Moj si, moj savršen greh, neću, ne želim da stanem,
Ja bih da zagrlim te, a ti bi da odeš odavde.
Moj si, moj melek, moj bol!
Kako da pomerim s’ tobom kraj?
U oči dok gledam te sad, k’o dete u porušen grad...

Vidim sve, čujem sve, sve predosećam,
Nisi lep, nisi dobar, nisi čaroban.
Boli kad zaplače u meni ta devojčica, što voli te, voli te, voli te...

LYRICS:
Svaki sat, svaki sprat ja sam brojala,
Noćima ispred tvojih vrata plakala.
I kad ljubav u tebi ne osećam,
Ne dam ja na tebe - MOJE.

Vidim sve, čujem sve, sve predosećam,
Nisi lep, nisi dobar, nisi čaroban.
Moj si lom, moj si slom, moj si brodolom,
Ja u tebi sve sam našla.

Moj si, moj savršen greh, neću, ne želim da stanem,
Ja bih da zagrlim te, a ti bi da odeš odavde.
Moj si, moj melek, moj bol!
Kako da pomerim s’ tobom kraj?
U oči dok gledam te sad, k’o dete u porušen grad...

Vidim sve, čujem sve, sve predosećam,
Nisi lep, nisi dobar, nisi čaroban.
Boli kad zaplače u meni ta devojčica, što voli te, voli te, voli te...

snippet.title: An Afternoon with Prince Harry & James Corden
snippet.description:
Now that the Duke and Duchess of Sussex are settled into Southern California, James Corden thought it was time to show his friend Prince Harry the sights. From tea on an open top bus to visiting the "Fresh Prince of Bel Air" mansion, Prince Harry gets the tour he never dreamed of. Special thanks to Spartan for providing an incredible Spartan Race Obstacle Course to run. Learn more: spartan.com

More Late Late Show:
Subscribe: http://bit.ly/CordenYouTube
Watch Full Episodes: http://bit.ly/1ENyPw4
Facebook: http://on.fb.me/19PIHLC
Twitter: http://bit.ly/1Iv0q6k
Instagram: http://bit.ly/latelategram

Watch The Late Late Show with James Corden weeknights at 12:35 AM ET/11:35 PM CT. Only on CBS.

Get new episodes of shows you love across devices the next day, stream live TV, and watch full seasons of CBS fan favorites anytime, anywhere with CBS All Access. Try it free! http://bit.ly/1OQA29B

---
Each week night, THE LATE LATE SHOW with JAMES CORDEN throws the ultimate late night after party with a mix of celebrity guests, edgy musical acts, games and sketches. Corden differentiates his show by offering viewers a peek behind-the-scenes into the green room, bringing all of his guests out at once and lending his musical and acting talents to various sketches. Additionally, bandleader Reggie Watts and the house band provide original, improvised music throughout the show. Since Corden took the reigns as host in March 2015, he has quickly become known for generating buzzworthy viral videos, such as Carpool Karaoke."

snippet.title: UFC 260: Miocic vs Ngannou 2 – One More Shot | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
The foundations of the Octagon will shake on March 27 when the sport’s premier big men, UFC heavyweight champion Stipe Miocic and number one contender Francis Ngannou meet for the second time in the main event of UFC 260. Widely considered to be the greatest heavyweight in UFC history, Miocic defeated Ngannou in 2018, but in his last four bouts, “The Predator” has scored four consecutive first-round knockouts, proving that he is more than ready to face Cleveland’s finest once again. Plus, fresh from a pair of victories over Max Holloway, UFC featherweight champion Alexander “The Great” Volkanovski defends his crown against Brian “T-City” Ortega.

Subscribe to get all the latest UFC content: http://bit.ly/2uJRzRR

Experience UFC live with UFC FIGHT PASS, the digital subscription service of the UFC. Visit https://ufcfightpass.com/

To order UFC Pay-Per-Views on ESPN+, visit https://bit.ly/2vNIBE8 (U.S. only)

snippet.title: Starship | SN10 | High-Altitude Flight Test
snippet.description:
As early as Wednesday, March 3, the SpaceX team will attempt a high-altitude flight test of Starship serial number 10 (SN10) – our third high-altitude suborbital flight test of a Starship prototype from SpaceX’s site in Cameron County, Texas. Similar to the high-altitude flight tests of Starship SN8 and SN9, SN10 will be powered through ascent by three Raptor engines, each shutting down in sequence prior to the vehicle reaching apogee – approximately 10 km in altitude. SN10 will perform a propellant transition to the internal header tanks, which hold landing propellant, before reorienting itself for reentry and a controlled aerodynamic descent.
  
The Starship prototype will descend under active aerodynamic control, accomplished by independent movement of two forward and two aft flaps on the vehicle. All four flaps are actuated by an onboard flight computer to control Starship’s attitude during flight and enable precise landing at the intended location. SN10’s Raptor engines will then reignite as the vehicle attempts a landing flip maneuver immediately before touching down on the landing pad adjacent to the launch mount. 

A controlled aerodynamic descent with body flaps and vertical landing capability, combined with in-space refilling, are critical to landing Starship at destinations across the solar system where prepared surfaces or runways do not exist, and returning to Earth. This capability will enable a fully reusable transportation system designed to carry both crew and cargo on long-duration, interplanetary flights and help humanity return to the Moon, and travel to Mars and beyond.  

Given the dynamic schedule of development testing, stay tuned to our social media channels for updates as we move toward SpaceX’s third high-altitude flight test of Starship!

TEKST “ HRAM”

Ostavio sam svoje dane u noći, 
Pa na sebe još sam ljut; 
I pogledam u mrak, ko u tvoje oči, 
U taj praznik prekinut.. 
Još me hrani nada da me pamtiš, 
Da sam ti sve, 
Ljubav nije uzmeš pa je vratiš 
Boli me... 

Tvoja ljubav je hram ljubavi 
I kad lomi se nebo ti zlato i srebro si, 
Hram ljubavi, 
Pobeda nam je predaja, zauvek duše su nam ogledala 
Ne veruj ni reč samo srca znaju 
Kad od želje gube dah; 
Ova ljubav je počela na kraju, 
Al imam snage za taj strah..

I kad lomi se nebo ti zlato i srebro si, 
Hram ljubavi, 
Pobeda nam je predaja, zauvek duše su nam ogledala 
Ne veruj ni reč samo srca znaju 
Kad od želje gube dah; 
Ova ljubav je počela na kraju, 
Al imam snage za taj strah..



Zabranjeno svako kopiranje video i/ili audio snimaka i postavljanje na druge kanale!

The broadcast was also honored with an Alfred I. duPont-Columbia Award as part of CBS News division-wide coverage of the shootings at Sandy Hook Elementary School in Newtown, Connecticut. snippet.title: Najjednostavnija čokoladna torta sa piškotama - bez kuvanja i pečenja
snippet.description:
Čokoladna torta sa piškotama je za sve one koji vole mnogo bogatog krema. Iz naslova vidimo da je sa čokoladom, kao i da je priprema veoma jednostavna, tako da će se sigurno dopasti svima sa nedostatkom vremena. Tortu sa piškotama možete da pravite uz dodavanje nekih svojih omiljenih sastojaka jer je apsolutno podložna promenama. 

Pisani recept možete pronaći na https://domacirecepti.net/cokoladna-torta-sa-piskotama-video/

Domaći recepti je kanal na kojem prikazujemo video recepte za torte, kolače, pogače, kifle. Možete naći predjela kao i glavna jela. Pravimo još i sitne kolače, kolače za slavu, lepinje, posna jela, slavske pogače.

▶ Možete nas podržati i na ovaj način: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCziASxiSNISFR_FxJ8vFjnA/join

1 l slatke pavlake
400 g tamne čokolade
160 g mlečne čokolade
4 pakovanja piškota
120 g šlaga od čokolade

sr.title: Najjednostavnija čokoladna torta sa piškotama - bez kuvanja i pečenja
sr.description:
Čokoladna torta sa piškotama je za sve one koji vole mnogo bogatog krema. Iz naslova vidimo da je sa čokoladom, kao i da je priprema veoma jednostavna, tako da će se sigurno dopasti svima sa nedostatkom vremena. Tortu sa piškotama možete da pravite uz dodavanje nekih svojih omiljenih sastojaka jer je apsolutno podložna promenama. 

Pisani recept možete pronaći na https://domacirecepti.net/cokoladna-torta-sa-piskotama-video/

Domaći recepti je kanal na kojem prikazujemo video recepte za torte, kolače, pogače, kifle. Možete naći predjela kao i glavna jela. Pravimo još i sitne kolače, kolače za slavu, lepinje, posna jela, slavske pogače.

▶ Možete nas podržati i na ovaj način: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCziASxiSNISFR_FxJ8vFjnA/join

𝐒𝐚𝐬𝐭𝐨𝐣𝐜𝐢:

1 l slatke pavlake
400 g tamne čokolade
160 g mlečne čokolade
4 pakovanja piškota
120 g šlaga od čokolade

još mleko za umakanje piškota

snippet.title: Watch NASA’s Perseverance Rover Land on Mars!
snippet.description:
Watch an epic journey unfold on Thursday, Feb. 18 as our Perseverance rover lands on Mars. To reach the surface of the Red Planet, the rover has to survive the harrowing final phase known as Entry, Descent, and Landing.
 
Only then can the rover – the biggest, heaviest, cleanest, and most sophisticated six-wheeled robot ever launched into space – search Jezero Crater for signs of ancient life and collect samples that will eventually be returned to Earth.
 
Tune in to a live video feed of key landing activities and commentary from Mission Control at NASA’s Jet Propulsion Laboratory.

snippet.title: Дан заљубљених у Дијаниној школи | Кога ће Диана одабрати?
snippet.description:
Дан заљубљених се одржава у школи, а сви дечаци и девојчице припремили су поклоне за своје сродне душе. Али осећања нису увек обострана, а неки имају и неколико обожавалаца. Кога ће Диана одабрати? Дима или кошаркаш? Погледајте у овој серији!
Још један видео:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2hsc80Z5lKw

snippet.title: Full Replay: Starship SN10 Flight Test, Landing, and Post-Flight BOOM!
snippet.description:
SpaceX is set to launch the Starship SN10 prototype to an altitude of approximately 10 kilometers. A launch attempt is possible between 9 am and 6 pm Central time on Wednesday. However, as with testing, there is always a chance that teams could decide to stand down and try again on a different day.

This original content is copyrighted to NASASpaceflight (NASASpaceflight.com) and is not to be reused in any form without explicit permission.

snippet.title: Dvanaest godina nije obukao čarape
snippet.description:
Žarko Hrgić i Zenice neobičan je po svemu. Dvanaest godina živi u špilji uz Babinu rijeku  bez struje i vode. Nikada vatru nije naložio, nikada se nije razbolio a jedan od njegovih recepata je život bez čarapa na nogama. Umjesto čarapa Žarko noge oblaže prvo papirom od vreća za brašno a zatim sve to obloži najlonom. Nakon toga obuva obuća na noge. Bez obzira na vanjsku temperaturu Žare ne nosi čarape. Pogledajte video koji smo snimili kod kontejnera za otpad koje Žarko svakodnevno posjećuje.
Pridružite se tom kanalu da biste dobili pristup pogodnostima:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIu6gtFVDK1u93irvvVrD2A/join

snippet.title: KONAČNI OBRAČUN SA REPTILIMA: Mi smo deo velikog sukoba, štiti nas moćna galaktička federacija!
snippet.description:
Gost na YouTube kanalu "Nauka i Misterije Balkan" bio je Aleksandar Hengl, osnivač društva prijatelja "Povratak Izvoru". On je medijum, astralni putnik i komunikacioni kanal za vanzemaljske civilizacije galaktičke federacije, u misiji za podizanje svesti usnulog čovečanstva i njegovu integraciju u galaktičke tokove i Univerzumske Unifikacije. Kao osnivač duhovnog centra “Povratak Izvoru” u Novom Sadu, organizuje edukativne skupove "Susret nauke i duhovnosti". Takođe je i saradnik serijala emisija “Kosmos”. Preporučujemo Vam da pogledate celu emisiju i saznate više o brojnim zanimljivim temama.

Emisiju je vodio novinar Aleksandar Pavković.

*************************************************************

Zabranjeno je svako preuzimanje snimaka i objavljivanje na drugim YouTube kanalima. Svi duplikati će biti uklanjani u skladu sa YouTube pravilima. Iz ovoga će biti izuzeti samo oni koji dobiju specijalnu dozvolu od vlasnika autorskih prava.

Autorska prava: "BALKAN INFO - Zvanični kanal"
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCLG5Qu54Q7gywaCeDs5etuQ

*************************************************************

Svi koji verno prate emisije i žele da pomognu rad naše produkcije to mogu učiniti iz Srbije i iz inostranstva. Trudićemo se da ostanemo dosledni našoj ideji o slobodnom novinarstvu i širenju istine bez cenzure.

PAYPAL - Donacije za našu produkciju
https://www.paypal.me/tvbalkaninfo/

PATREON - Donacije za našu produkciju
https://www.patreon.com/tvbalkaninfo/

BALKAN INFO - Druge mogućnosti za donacije
https://www.balkaninfo.rs/donacije/

*************************************************************

Rad naše produkcije možete podržati kupovinom majica, dukserica, šolja i drugih proizvoda koji uz moderan i elegantan dizajn promovišu vrednosti za koje se svi zajedno borimo.

BALKAN INFO - Zvanična online prodavnica
https://www.balkaninfo.rs/prodavnica/

TEESPRING - Online prodavnica (samo za inostranstvo)
https://teespring.com/stores/tvbalkaninfo/

*************************************************************

BALKAN INFO je nezavisna medijska produkcija osnovana u junu 2015. godine u Beogradu. Prepoznati smo kao glas svih koji ne žele da budu deo kratkotrajnih projekata i saveza, svih onih koji poštuju srpske tradicionalne vrednosti i koji čuvaju sećanje na naše slavne pretke.

BALKAN INFO - Nezavisna medijska produkcija
https://www.youtube.com/tvbalkaninfo/

DOKUMENTARNE EMISIJE BALKAN - Kratki snimci
https://www.youtube.com/dokumentarcibalkan/

NAUKA I MISTERIJE BALKAN - Naš drugi kanal
https://www.youtube.com/naukaimisterijebalkan/

OLUJA PROMENA - Naš treći kanal
https://www.youtube.com/olujapromena/

*************************************************************

Naš rad možete pratiti i na drugim društvenim mrežama:

BALKAN INFO - Facebook
https://www.facebook.com/tvbalkaninfo

BALKAN INFO - Instagram
https://www.instagram.com/tvbalkaninfo/

https://twitter.com/tvbalkaninfo

snippet.title: Emanet 131. Bölüm Fragmanı | Legacy Episode 131 Promo
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman Kırımlı is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father’s death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew… Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle’s arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the Kırımlı family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the Kırımlı mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam
#Shorts

snippet.title: Drone footage shows damaged buildings after powerful earthquake in Greece
snippet.description:
A strong 6.2 magnitude earthquake struck the region of Larissa in central Greece on Wednesday, damaging houses and vehicles and sending people fleeing from their homes.
 
Drone footage captured over Damasi village showed stone houses destroyed and bricks fallen from walls. 

In the village of Damasi, home to 1,500 residents, the schoolhouse and several other homes suffered extensive damage as roofs and walls collapsed, some of them onto parked vehicles, burying them in rubble.

There were no initial reports of casualties or serious injuries from the quake.

Greek seismologists said there was a sequence of post-quake tremors and advised schools to stay closed in the coming days.

For more info, please go to https://globalnews.ca/news/7640406/banff-earthquake-folo-feb-14-2020/

Subscribe to Global News Channel HERE: http://bit.ly/20fcXDc

snippet.title: OSIJEK vs GORICA 1:1 (24.kolo, HT Prva liga 20/21)
snippet.description:
U vrlo važnom dvoboju 24. kola HT Prve lige za vrh ljestvice Osijek i Gorica su osvojili po bod odigravši 1:1. Iznimno uzbudljivo pogotovo je bilo u sudačkoj nadoknadi susreta.

Dvoboj je počeo šansom Miereza, no vrlo brzo je Gorica pokazala da može igrati ravnopravno kod Osijeka. Vremenom, gosti iz Velike Gorice ostavljali su i dojam organiziranije i konkretnije momčadi.

Igralo se vrlo čvrsto, a nakon nekoliko solidnih šansi s obje strane u 55. minuti je postignut prvi pogodak. Matar Dieye je iz drugog pokušaja, nakon uvodne dobre reakcije osječkog vratara Ivušića, zabio za 1:0 gostiju.

Osijek je bio osuđen loviti zaostatak, ali do sudačke nadoknade imao je samo jednu dobru šansu (Mierez). No, u nadoknadi je krenula ludnica.

Prvo je Bohar realizirao jedanaesterac u 91. minuti, dok je Ante Erceg u 95. iz blizine zabio za 2:1. Ipak, VAR provjera je pokazala da je igrač Osijeka tom prilikom bio u minimalnom zaleđu.

Osijek je time napravio korak unatrag u borbi za sam vrh ljestvice, a Gorica je ostala na pet bodova iza Osijeka.

Kao i sve ranije utakmice ovog kola, tako je i u Osijeku susret započeo minutom šutnje u znak preminulog velikana hrvatskog nogometa Zlatka Kranjčara.

HT Prva liga, 24. kolo: Osijek - Gorica 1:1 (Bohar 90.+1-11m / Dieye 55.)

Odgovora nema gorko mirim se s tim...mirim se s tim.

Dozivam ju, da u sjećanju ostane...ostane tu.

ja čuvat ću stražu,

javi

Odgovora nema gorko mirim se s tim...mirim se s tim. 
 
Ako stvorim je tu, sve drugo bit će mi lako.
Ako stvorim je tu, kraj sebe bar na kratko.
Dozivam ju, da u sjećanju ostane...ostane tu. 
 
Spavaj, sanjaj
ja čuvat ću stražu,
a ako suze te pronađu 
javi 
 
Pjevaju li ptice kad ti zatreba stih ?
Vjeruj mi da mogu ja bih umjesto njih.
Čuvaju li kazaljke nas jutarnji mir ?
Odgovora nema gorko mirim se s tim...mirim se s tim. 
 
Ako stvorim je tu, sve drugo bit će mi lako.
Ako stvorim je tu, kraj sebe bar na kratko.
Dozivam ju, da u sjećanju ostane...ostane tu.

snippet.title: Perseverance Rover’s Descent and Touchdown on Mars (Official NASA Video)
snippet.description:
NASA's Mars 2020 Perseverance mission captured thrilling footage of its rover landing in Mars' Jezero Crater on Feb. 18, 2021.  The real footage in this video was captured by several cameras that are part of the rover's entry, descent, and landing suite. The views include a camera looking down from the spacecraft's descent stage (a kind of rocket-powered jet pack that helps fly the rover to its landing site), a camera on the rover looking up at the descent stage, a camera on the top of the aeroshell (a capsule protecting the rover) looking up at that parachute, and a camera on the bottom of the rover looking down at the Martian surface.
 
The audio embedded in the video comes from the mission control call-outs during entry, descent, and landing. 
 
For more information about Perseverance, visit https://mars.nasa.gov/perseverance
 
Credit: NASA/JPL-Caltech

snippet.title: Niko Kranjčar u suzama: ‘Cicek moj, you did it your way. Volimo te!’
snippet.description:
U suzama, u majici 'ponosan sam kaj sam Purger', Niko Kranjčar se popeo na pozornicu, pogledao prema gore i po posljednji put se oprostio od Cice Kranjčara. Od svog Ciceka, svog idola, uzora. Svog tate.

snippet.title: Emanet 130. Bölüm Fragmanı | Legacy Episode 130 Promo (English & Spanish subs)
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman Kırımlı is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father’s death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew… Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle’s arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the Kırımlı family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the Kırımlı mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam
#Shorts

snippet.title: Sen Çal Kapımı 35. Bölüm 1. Fragmanı
snippet.description:
Sen Çal Kapımı 35. Bölüm 1. Fragmanı

Hayatta bütün umutlarını eğitimine bağlayan Eda, yurtdışı eğitim bursunu keserek lise mezunu kalmasına neden olan Serkan Bolat’la karşı karşıya gelir. Serkan Bolat, kendisiyle iki ay nişanlı taklidi yaparsa Eda’ya bursunu geri vermeyi teklif eder. Eda nefret ettiği bu adamın teklifini önce reddetse de koşullar değişince kabul etmek zorunda kalır. Nişanlı taklidi yaparken, Serkan ve Eda , bütün doğru bildiklerini unutturacak, tutkulu, zorlu bir ilişki yaşamaya başlarlar. Çünkü aşk zordur. Ve bu yüzden muhteşemdir.

Oyuncular:
HANDE ERÇEL
KEREM BÜRSİN
NESLİHAN YELDAN
EVRİM DOĞAN
ANIL İLTER
MELİSA DÖNGEL
ÇAĞRI ÇITANAK
ELÇİN AFACAN
SİTARE AKBAŞ
BAŞAK GÜMÜLCİNELİOĞLU
ALİCAN AYTEKİN

It's Monday 8 March 2021. Our top stories this morning 0:00

The Duke and Duchess of Sussex's much-anticipated interview with Oprah Winfrey has aired in the US - with the couple sharing their side of the story about life in the Royal Family.

The couple spoke about their relationships with other royals, racism and how their mental health suffered.

Meghan spoke with Oprah for most of the interview, before being joined by Prince Harry.

Get the full story 👉 http://bbc.in/3rqBdH3

After the teasing clips, the full interview between the Duke and Duchess of Sussex and Oprah Winfrey was shown last night in the US. Oprah with Meghan and Harry: A Primetime Special, is produced by Harpo Productions

Follow the story 👉 https://bbc.in/3bnQe6D

snippet.title: Obraćanje predsednika Srbije Aleksandra Vučića posle sednice Saveta za nacionalnu bezbednost (18+)
snippet.description:
Najbrže rastući portal u Srbiji https://www.alo.rs/​ 

Sednica Saveta za nacionalnu bezbednost na kojoj će se raspravljati o detaljima u vezi sa akcijom borbe protiv organizovanog kriminala u Srbiji održala se u 18 časova u Palati Srbija.

Kako je Vučić najavio ranije danas, na sednici se razmatraju veoma ozbiljna pitanja, situacija oko korona virusa, nove prilike na Kosovu i Metohiji, u regionu, u svetu i Evropi, novoj administraciji u SAD, a pre svega o borbi protiv organizovanog kriminala.

#NajnovijeVestiSrbija​ #AleksandarVučić​ #SavetZaNacionalnuBezbednost​

FACEBOOK: https://www.facebook.com/ALOjavlja​

INSTAGRAM: https://www.instagram.com/alo_novine/​

TWITTER: https://twitter.com/ALOnovine

snippet.title: See Mars Like Never Before! NASA's Perseverance Rover Sends New Video and Images of the Red Planet
snippet.description: NASA’s Perseverance Mars Rover safely touched down on the Red Planet on Feb. 18. So what will the robotic scientist "see" on her descent and what will she do next? Join mission experts for update about the rover – the biggest, heaviest, cleanest, and most sophisticated six-wheeled robot ever launched into space – including imagery it captured and its mission to explore Mars.

snippet.description:
DAVID RADOSAVLJEVIC x DRIA - DIOR
David i Dria Booking & info: +38163606609 Sasa Matejic

Muzika: Neven IN VIVO
Tekst: Neven IN VIVO
Aranzman: Patriarch
Mix i Master: TOZLA

Video by Visual Fever
https://www.instagram.com/visual.fever.studio

Specijalno hvala event centru Club City Hall na nesebicnoj pomoci pri realizaciji spota
https://www.instagram.com/clubcityhall

David Radosavljevic instagram:
https://www.instagram.com/radosavljevicdavid

Dria instagram:
https://www.instagram.com/_dria.1_

Patriarch instagram:
https://www.instagram.com/patriarch_x6x

Tozla instagram:
https://www.instagram.com/tozla

Neven IN VIVO instagram:
https://www.instagram.com/neven_invivo

Skinucu ti taj Dior, s ramena s ramena,
Volim kako zvuci uzdah mog imena, s tvojih toplih usana,
Skinucu ti taj Dior, s ramena s ramena,
Kad mi tiho kazes sta da ti radim ja,
Benzin preko plamena.

Sa tobom sve je rulet, od milke do nule,
Brze nego Tesla S, ej
Tako ti je sa princezama, voli kad je vezana,
Pssst, Samo niko da ne cuje.

Ele ele ele ele
Ko bi reko da je mala ziva vatra.
Ele ele
Njene misli koje skriva nocu gresnije od pakla.

Subota uvece, susi, Buddha bar,
Leti ide se na Rodos,
Zivi zivot mala kao da je superstar,
Mamin i tatin je ponos.

Skinucu ti taj Dior, s ramena s ramena,
Volim kako zvuci uzdah mog imena, s tvojih toplih usana,
Skinucu ti taj Dior, s ramena s ramena,
Kad mi tiho kazes sta da ti radim ja,
Benzin preko plamena.

Mala moze casove da daje,
Kada igra opasna je,
I svi kazu aj jaj jaj jaj,

Nocas lepa je ko Raj,
Kukovima uvija,
I svi kazu samo aj jaj jaj

Subota uvece, susi, Buddha bar,
Leti ide se na Rodos,
Zivi zivot mala kao da je superstar,
Mamin i tatin je ponos.

Skinucu ti taj Dior, s ramena s ramena,

Skinucu ti taj Dior, s ramena s ramena,

Volim kako zvuci uzdah mog imena, s tvojih toplih usana,
Skinucu ti taj Dior, s ramena s ramena,
Kad mi tiho kazes sta da ti radim ja,
Benzin preko plamena.

Mala moze casove da daje,
Kada igra opasna je,
I svi kazu aj jaj jaj jaj,

Nocas lepa je ko Raj,
Kukovima uvija,
I svi kazu samo aj jaj jaj

Subota uvece, susi, Buddha bar,
Leti ide se na Rodos,
Zivi zivot mala kao da je superstar,
Mamin i tatin je ponos.

Skinucu ti taj Dior, s ramena s ramena,
Volim kako zvuci uzdah mog imena, s tvojih toplih usana,
Skinucu ti taj Dior, s ramena s ramena,
Kad mi tiho kazes sta da ti radim ja,
Benzin preko plamena.

snippet.title: Fullscreen: Nevjerovatno putovanje
snippet.description:
April 1993. Sarajevo je bilo pod dramatičnom opsadom još od proljeća 1992. godine. Usred uništavanja zemlja je postepeno pokušavala uspostaviti institucije.

Među njima je i Košarkaški savez BiH. Jedan od ciljeva bio im je putem sporta smjestiti Bosnu i Hercegovinu na kartu svijeta.

Misiju je vodio Mirza Delibašić, legenda jugoslavenske košarke, bivši igrač Real Madrida, olimpijski, svjetski i evropski prvak.

#TheLongShot #NevjerovatnoPutovanje #MirzaDelibasic

Pratite nas: http://www.youtube.com/ajbalkans
http://facebook.com/ajbalkans
http://instagram.com/ajbalkans/
http://twitter.com/ajbalkans
http://balkans.aljazeera.net

snippet.title: 8.1 Earthquake Near Kermadec Islands, New Zealand - LIVE BREAKING NEWS COVERAGE
snippet.description:
BREAKING: An 8.1 earthquake has occurred near the Kermadec Islands, New Zealand, according to the USGS. There is a tsunami warning. Get the latest in our LIVE COVERAGE. 

This 8.1 earthquake comes less than two hours after a 7.4 earthquake struck near the Kermadec Islands in New Zealand. And earlier today, there was a 7.3 quake off the coast of New Zealand's North Island. New Zealand civil defense says there could be tsunami waves in New Zealand of up to three meters. There is a tsunami threat for other countries as well. In this interactive live stream, host Steve Lookner brings you the latest news on the 8.1 earthquake near the Kermadec Islands in New Zealand, along with the newest tsunami updates, and he'll also read your comments and questions on the air!

Follow us on Twitter!  http://twitter.com/AgendaFreeTV
Follow us on Facebook!  http://www.facebook.com/AgendaFreeTV
Follow us on Periscope!  @AgendaFreeTV

Your donations keep us on the air! 
Donate at http://agendafree.tv

Or get cool Agenda-Free TV rewards by supporting us on Patreon: http://www.patreon.com/agendafreetv

If you don't want to miss a live breaking news broadcast, sign up for free notifications at our Discord notifications server! 
https://discord.gg/H2nKnpgR3Z
These are the most reliable notifications available and you can also get them on your phone if you download the Discord app.

The official YouTube channel of Atlantic Records artist Bruno Mars. 11x GRAMMY Award winner and 27x GRAMMY Award nominee Bruno Mars is a celebrated singer, songwriter, producer, and musician with iconic hits like "The Lazy Song", "That's What I Like", "Just The Way You Are", "24K Magic", "Locked Out Of Heaven", and "When I Was Your Man". His legendary body of work also includes blockbuster albums such as Doo-Wops & Hooligans, Unorthodox Jukebox, and 24K Magic, as well as era-defining collaborations like "Uptown Funk" with Mark Ronson, "Finesse" with Cardi B, and "Nothin' On You" with B.o.B. Forever classic, yet supremely innovative, Bruno continues to redefine music, style, and popular culture, pushing the boundaries of pop, R&B, funk, soul, hip-hop, and dance, and remains as influential as ever.

snippet.title: Posljednji ispraćaj Milana Bandića | Mirogoj - 03.03.2021.
snippet.description:
Posljednji ispraćaj gradonačelnika Zagreba Milana Bandića počinje na zagrebačkom Gradskom groblju Mirogoj u 12 sati. Očekuje se veliki broj ljudi, a samo je COVID redara angažirano 300. Uvedene su i posebne autobusne linije.

Više na: https://bit.ly/Bandić_ispraćaj

Gradonačelnik Milan Bandić bit će pokopan na Mirogoju u 12 sati. Bandić neće biti pokopan u Aleji Velikana, već kod Zida boli, nedaleko od groba Većeslava Holjevca.

Grad je utorak objavio i program pogreba. Obred će predvoditi mons. Zlatko Koren. Na ispraćaju će od dužnosnika biti predsjednik Sabora Gordan Jandroković, premijer Andrej Plenković te ministri Tomo Medved i Gordan Grlić Radman.

Bandića će ispratiti klapa Hrvatske ratne mornarice ''Sveti Juraj'' uz njegove tri najdraže pjesme ''Oči u oči'', ''Na omiškoj stini'' i ''Pod brajde''.

"Svjesni smo epidemiološke situacije i maksimalno ćemo se pridržavati mjera, bit će ondje COVID redari i sredstva za dezinfekciju. Očekujemo da će ljudi dolaziti sve do nedjelje opraštati se od Milana Bandića", rekla je ranije Jelena Pavičić Vukičević, obnašateljica dužnosti gradonačelnice do lokalnih izbora.

Pretplatite se na naš kanal: 
http://bit.ly/NovaTV_Subscribe

Pratite nas: 
https://www.facebook.com/NovaTV.hr/
https://www.instagram.com/novatv_/
http://novatv.dnevnik.hr/
https://twitter.com/novahr

#MilanBandić #sprovod #Mirogoj

snippet.title: Pawn Stars: 5 SUPER RARE ILLEGAL ITEMS | History
snippet.description:
Watch all new episodes of Pawn Stars, returning Monday, March 22 at 9/8c, and stay up to date on all of your favorite The HISTORY Channel shows at https://history.com/schedule.

Check out 5 items with remarkable histories - but that are illegal to buy and sell! From an antique gun desk to a tortoiseshell guitar, these illegal items are just not worth the risk, in this Pawn Stars compilation. #PawnStars #RickHarrison
Find out more about the show and watch full episodes on our site:
https://histv.co/PawnStars

Check out exclusive The HISTORY Channel content:
History Newsletter - https://histv.co/newsletter
Website - https://histv.co/History
Facebook - https://histv.co/Facebook
Twitter - https://histv.co/Twitter

"Pawn Stars" follows three generations of the Harrison family as they assess the value of items coming in and out of their Gold & Silver Pawn Shop in Las Vegas, from the commonplace to the truly historic.

HISTORY® is the leading destination for award-winning original series and specials that connect viewers with history in an informative, immersive, and entertaining manner across all platforms. The network's all-original programming slate features a roster of hit series, premium documentaries, and scripted event programming.

snippet.title: Barcelona vs. Paris Saint-Germain: Extended Highlights | UCL on CBS Sports
snippet.description:
Extended Highlights presented by Heineken 

Mbappe and PSG power past Messi and Barcelona 4-1 in the first leg of the UEFA Champions League Round of 16. Mbappe had one of his best performances of his career notching a hat trick. He opened his day with a goal in the 32’ to tie at one and added two more in the 65’ and 85’. Moise Kean found the back of the net in the 70’ to help solidify the win.  Messi opened the scoring in the 27’ by way of the penalty spot but that would be all the Spanish side could muster. 

Next up will be the second leg back in Paris, France and Barcelona has an uphill battle in front of them. 

Stream every UEFA Champions League match live on CBS All Access:
http://bit.ly/ucloncbssports

#UEFA #ChampionsLeague #UCL #Roundof16 #HatTrick #MBappe #Kean #Messi #PSG #Barcelona #ParisSaintGermain #Barca (edited)

snippet.title: Top 30 Frequently Asked Questions about Boris (Q&A)
snippet.description:
JOIN channel, become friend: https://www.youtube.com/lifeofboris/join
Anatoli channel: https://youtube.com/c/lifeofanatolistar

00:00 intro
00:54 top 30 questions
19:43 extra 10 questions

I asked on community tab for everyone to send me their biggest questions. I expected big results. I did not expect 2500+ comments though. I picked the top 30 most highly rated questions and answered them. As honestly as I can. There was questions about face reveal. There was questions about my origin and history. I reveal a lot of info. A lot of it is new info. These are the most frequently asked questions about Boris.
Enjoy.

snippet.title: Life found beneath Antarctic ice sheet 'shouldn't be there'
snippet.description:
Biologists say the inadvertent discovery of sea life on a boulder underneath an Antarctic ice shelf and hundreds of kilometres challenges our understanding of how far organisms can live from sunlight.

A British Antarctic Survey team drilled through the 900-metre-thick Filchner-Ronne Ice Shelf and dropped a camera down the hole in search of mud on the seabed. To their surprise, the camera revealed a boulder ringed by animals. Video footage appear to show 16 sponges, accompanied by 22 unidentified animals which could include barnacles. It is the first time such immobile life has been found beneath an Antarctic ice sheet.  “There’s all sorts of reasons they shouldn’t be there,” says Huw Griffiths at the British Antarctic Survey, who analysed the footage.

Read more: https://www.newscientist.com/article/2267737-life-found-beneath-antarctic-ice-sheet-shouldnt-be-there/

snippet.title: Texas's power disaster is a warning sign for the US
snippet.description:
America's power grid is not ready.

Subscribe and turn on notifications (🔔 ) so you don't miss any videos: http://goo.gl/0bsAjO

In February, extreme cold and an unusual winter storm left millions of Texans in the dark. Many went without power or water, in subzero temperatures, for nearly five days. It was a disaster; dozens died. But even though that storm hit much of the country, the power outages were mostly limited to Texas. That’s because Texas is on its own electrical grid, separate from the rest of the country, which means it can’t easily get power from other states in an emergency.

But Texas's grid itself is not what failed. Power went out across Texas in the first place because energy sources across the state were unprepared for severe weather. And that didn’t have to happen; Texas had been warned about this exact scenario, and had actually experienced versions of it twice in the last 30 years. But they didn’t prepare.

Now the rest of the US faces the same issue. Climate change is making severe weather disasters more and more frequent. And the American energy system is not ready for it.

Read more about what happened in Texas and about the US electrical grid: https://www.vox.com/22289517/texas-storm-uri-weather-power-outage-snow

And check out more coverage of the Texas power crisis from the Texas Tribune: https://www.texastribune.org/2021/02/22/texas-power-grid-extreme-weather/

Vox.com is a news website that helps you cut through the noise and understand what's really driving the events in the headlines. Check out http://www.vox.com.

snippet.title: Why It's Almost Impossible For An Engine To Rev Over 20,000 RPM
snippet.description:

snippet.title: Emanet 128. Bölüm Fragmanı | Legacy Episode 128 Promo (English & Spanish subs)
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman Kırımlı is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father’s death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew… Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle’s arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the Kırımlı family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the Kırımlı mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam

snippet.title: INTERVJU: Zoran Branković - Velja Nevolja je dokaz da je viteštvo nestalo sa asfalta! (26.2.2021)
snippet.description:
Gost emisije "Intervju" bio je Zoran Lepi Branković, momak sa voždovačkog asfalta i legenda devedesetih. Videvši svoj uzor u starijima poput Đorđa Božovića Giške, uz svoju braću Rukija i Sašu, prijatelje Aleksandra Kneževića Kneleta, Kristijana Golubovića, Bojana Banovića i ostale odrastao je u vremenima vrelog beogradskog asfalta. Poznavao je Željka Ražnatovića Arkana, Sredoja Šljukića Šljuku, Zorana Uskokovića Skoleta, Radeta Ćaldovića Ćentu i mnoge druge koji su otišli u legendu. Godine provedene u zatvorima i meci koji su ga pogađali nisu uspeli da ga pokolebaju. Samo je postao jači i odlučniji da zauvek sačuva status čoveka koji se ničega ne plaši. Upravo zbog svoje odlučnosti nije sačekao da mu istekne zatvorska kazna koju služi, već je rešio da s "nanogicom" objasni zbog čega su devedesete bile opasno vreme i zašto njihov duh i daje provejava beogradskim ulicama. Preporučujemo Vam da pogledate ceo intervju i saznate više o brojnim zanimljivim temama.

Intervju je snimljen 19.02.2021. godine u našim prostorijama, u Beogradu. Emisiju je vodio novinar Aleksandar Pavković.

*************************************************************

Svi koji verno prate emisije i žele da pomognu rad naše produkcije to mogu učiniti iz Srbije i iz inostranstva. Trudićemo se da ostanemo dosledni našoj ideji o slobodnom novinarstvu i širenju istine bez cenzure.

PAYPAL - Donacije za našu produkciju
https://www.paypal.me/tvbalkaninfo/

PATREON - Donacije za našu produkciju
https://www.patreon.com/tvbalkaninfo/

BALKAN INFO - Druge mogućnosti za donacije
https://www.balkaninfo.rs/donacije/

*************************************************************

Rad naše produkcije možete podržati kupovinom majica, dukserica, šolja i drugih proizvoda koji uz moderan i elegantan dizajn promovišu vrednosti za koje se svi zajedno borimo.

BALKAN INFO - Zvanična online prodavnica
https://www.balkaninfo.rs/prodavnica/

TEESPRING - Online prodavnica (samo za inostranstvo)
https://teespring.com/stores/tvbalkaninfo/

*************************************************************

BALKAN INFO je nezavisna medijska produkcija osnovana u junu 2015. godine u Beogradu. Prepoznati smo kao glas svih koji ne žele da budu deo kratkotrajnih projekata i saveza, svih onih koji poštuju srpske tradicionalne vrednosti i koji čuvaju sećanje na naše slavne pretke.

BALKAN INFO - Nezavisna medijska produkcija
https://www.youtube.com/tvbalkaninfo/

snippet.title: Doğduğun Ev Kaderindir 34. Bölüm Fragmanı
snippet.description:
Doğduğun Ev Kaderindir 34. Bölüm Fragmanı

Doğduğun Ev Kaderindir Kanalına Abone Ol : https://shorturl.at/doxBI

“GERÇEK BİR HAYAT HİKAYESİ”
İNSAN KADERİNİ DEĞİŞTİREBİLİR Mİ?

“Doğduğun ev kaderinmiş. 
Kimi sevip kiminle evleneceğine bile doğduğun ev karar veriyormuş”

Gerçek bir hayat hikayesi!

Doğduğun Ev Kaderindir, “kimi sevip kiminle evleneceğine bile doğduğun ev karar veriyormuş. Önce anneler alıyormuş kalemi eline, başlıyormuş yazmaya” ile kaderin sırrını aralayan ve gerçek bir hayat hikayesinden uyarlanan senaryosuyla aşkın, hayatın ve aile yaşamının gözle görünmeyen odalarına yolculuk ediyor.

#Demetözdemir #İbrahimçelikkol #Enginöztürk #OGM #TV8

snippet.title: Realistican dan u 7-om mjesecu trudnoce
snippet.description:
7 -mi mjesec trudnoce sam snimila kao realistican dan,jer sam do sad radila posebno videe sta se to mjenja svakog mjeseca u trudnoci pa sam htjela da ovaj bude drugaciji.Uglavnom obuhvatila sam sve projmene koje su se desile kod mene u 7-om mjesecu.
Pisite da li vam se dopada ovaj nacin snimjanja kada je u pitanju trudnoca?
Vjezbe koje radim skoro svaki dan
 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Pd7_vi0GV1c&t=1224s

Nadam se da će vam se dopasti 🤩

Ne zaboravite kliknuti na malo crveno zvonce kako bi dobili obavijest čim objavim novi video .

snippet.title: Mortal Kombat (2021) - Official Red Band Trailer
snippet.description:
The Mortal Kombat movie reboot from director Simon McQuoid features the defenders of Earthrealm Liu Kang, Sonya Blade, Jax Briggs and more entering the Mortal Kombat tournament to save the world from Shang Tsung, Sub-Zero, Mileena and other supernatural kombatants.

This red band Mortal Kombat (2021) trailer shows off why it's rated R.

Mortal Kombat movie release date April 16, 2021.

snippet.title: GT-R NISMO v 911 Turbo S v R8 - DRAG RACE
snippet.description:
Need help buying your next car? Click https://www.carwow.co.uk/-help-me-carwow and my team and I will help you choose your ideal car at a fair price - from Mat Watson!
.............................................................

You know what time it is… Time for another EPIC carwow drag race! We’ve got Mat in a Nissan GT-R NISMO, and he’s going up against an Audi R8 V10 Performance & a Porsche 911 Turbo S! 

But how do they compare? First up, Mat’s GT-R NISMO is powered by a 3.8-litre twin-turbo V6 which can produce 600hp & 650Nm. The R8 alongside him has a 5.2-litre V10 with 625hp & 590Nm of torque. And then finally we have the Porsche, which has a 3.8-litre flat-six turbo to produce 650hp & 800Nm. 

So, there's one thing they have in common - they’re all absolutely awesome machines! But of course, there can only be one winner - so who’s your money on? We know how quick the 911 Turbo is, so it may be a foregone conclusion when it comes to who snatches the win... But could Mat snatch second place from Yianni in the Audi R8?

There’s only one way to find out… LET’S RACE!

Thanks to CS Panda for lending us their GT-R NISMO - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCxwBVsAoWWkQjKmSKOx5u2A

.............................................................

As long as you swear you won’t be pissed when I do it myself 
Let’s end it like we should and say we’re good

Now you’re holding this against me
Like I knew you would
I tried my best to make this easy
So don’t give me that look just say we’re good

We’re not meant to be like sleeping and cocaine
So let’s at least agree to go our separate ways
Not gonna judge you when you’re with somebody else
As long as you swear you won’t be pissed when I do it myself 
Let’s end it like we should and say we’re good

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'. 

#DuaLipa #FutureNostalgia #MoonlightEdition
